Zhiwei Shang

The University of Hong Kong

  • Hong Kong
  • Email

PhD Candidate in Management & Strategy

Department of Management & Strategy, The University of Hong Kong

Research Interests

  • Organization Economics
  • Personnel Economics
  • Labor Economics
  • Technological Change and the Future of Work

I am a PhD candidate in Management & Strategy at The University of Hong Kong. My research lies at organization economics, personnel economics and labor economics, with a focus on how technological change shapes the structure of organization, skill demand, and firm hiring behavior.

Last updated: April 2026.
